description: Two-block sequential LLM flow. Block 1 transforms the message; Block 2 summarises Block 1's output. The two-step structure is required by test_steps.py to assert exactly two StepCompleted events are yielded per run.

inputs.message: string — the user prompt forwarded to Block 1

outputs.result: string — the final output from Block 2
